title: FDA clears next-generation adaptive deep brain stimulation platform
clinicalRelevanceNotes: Potential signal for closed-loop stimulation workflows and post-approval adoption barriers in specialty neurology clinics.
notes: Check primary FDA database and company release before using. Possible consulting brief angle: provider workflow readiness.

title: Portable EEG startup announces multi-site concussion assessment study
clinicalRelevanceNotes: Relevant to point-of-care brain-health screening, but evidence quality depends on protocol, comparator, and real-world implementation data.
candidateIssue: Neurodiagnostics at the Point of Care
notes: Look for trial registration, endpoints, and whether sports medicine or emergency medicine buyers are primary target.

title: Brain-computer interface company reports first home-use milestone
clinicalRelevanceNotes: Strong editorial fit if the milestone demonstrates durable use outside a lab with meaningful functional outcomes for people with paralysis.
notes: Compare against prior feasibility milestones; avoid over-weighting demo value without longitudinal use data.

title: Systematic review evaluates digital therapeutics for ADHD symptom management
clinicalRelevanceNotes: Useful background source for separating regulated treatment claims from consumer cognitive wellness positioning.
candidateIssue: Evidence Quality in Digital Brain-Health Tools
notes: Extract inclusion criteria, effect sizes, comparator quality, and regulatory status of included products.
